title: Run scheduler cycles asynchronously from TUI
description: Fix TUI freezing by moving scheduler/run-triggered execution off the UI thread. Trigger run actions through Textual worker/background task mechanisms and surface progress/result updates back to the status panel without blocking keyboard/mouse interaction.
acceptance_criteria: Triggering scheduler run from TUI does not freeze input/render loop while work executes.
Status panel receives lifecycle updates (started/running/finished/failed) from async run path.
Regression tests verify UI remains responsive while run action is in flight.

handoff_summary.completed: Analysis and implementation plan complete. Identified run_scheduler_cycle() at tui.py:752 as the synchronous blocking call. action_scheduler_once (line 1356) and _on_interval_tick (line 1409) both call it directly on the UI thread.
handoff_summary.remaining: 1. Add scheduler_running: bool = False to TuiRuntimeState dataclass (after line 393). 2. Import work decorator from textual in build_tui_app (line 1072 area). 3. Add _run_scheduler_worker method with @work(thread=True) on OrchestratorTuiApp that wraps run_scheduler_cycle, sets scheduler_running=True before start, posts lifecycle status updates (started/running/finished/failed) via call_from_thread, sets scheduler_running=False on completion. 4. Update action_scheduler_once (line 1356) to check scheduler_running guard and launch worker instead of blocking call. 5. Update _on_interval_tick (line 1409) to launch worker with scheduler_running guard to prevent concurrent runs. 6. Add regression tests verifying: UI thread not blocked during scheduler run, lifecycle status updates received, concurrent run guard works, existing test_interval_tick_dispatches_refresh_and_scheduler_by_runtime_mode updated for async path.
handoff_summary.risks: Concurrent scheduler runs need scheduler_running flag guard. Existing tests that mock run_scheduler_cycle directly (lines 1266-1333 and 1725-1744 in test_tui.py) will need updates to account for async path. The @work decorator requires textual >=0.27 which should already be in deps.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry with file write permissions granted for src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py and tests/test_tui.py
handoff_summary.block_reason: File write permissions not granted - Edit tool was denied 4 times for src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py. Cannot implement changes without write access.

block_reason: File write permissions not granted - Edit tool was denied 4 times for src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py. Cannot implement changes without write access.
